verdict: Solid first-pass pilot. The content preserves the no-decision and transition-friction framing well, and the engagement prompts are specific enough to invite real operator replies.
strengths: Keeps the book insight grounded in vacation rental manager reality
Uses strong reframes instead of generic sales clichés
Includes both standalone tweets and thread-ready teaching assets
Engagement prompts feel targeted rather than tacked on
problems: A few tweets still read slightly like compressed LinkedIn thoughts rather than fully native Twitter lines
The thread openings are solid but could get even sharper on the first line
No status or scheduling workflow has been exercised yet beyond draft state
required_fixes: Pressure-test hooks over a few more pilot books to sharpen the Twitter-native style
Decide whether to formalize a dedicated Twitter review prompt or keep review lightweight for now
